instance: LinearOrder ℤ
instance : 
LinearOrder: Type → Type
LinearOrder 
Int: Type
Int where
  le := 
(·≤·): ℤ → ℤ → Prop
(·≤·)
  le_refl := 
Int.le_refl: ∀ (a : ℤ), a ≤ a
Int.le_refl
  le_trans := @
Int.le_trans: ∀ {a b c : ℤ}, a ≤ b → b ≤ c → a ≤ c
Int.le_trans
  le_antisymm := @
Int.le_antisymm: ∀ {a b : ℤ}, a ≤ b → b ≤ a → a = b
Int.le_antisymm
  lt := 
(·<·): ℤ → ℤ → Prop
(·<·)
  lt_iff_le_not_le := @
Int.lt_iff_le_not_le: ∀ {a b : ℤ}, a < b ↔ a ≤ b ∧ ¬b ≤ a
Int.lt_iff_le_not_le
  le_total := 
Int.le_total: ∀ (a b : ℤ), a ≤ b ∨ b ≤ a
Int.le_total
  decidable_eq := 
DecidableEq ℤ
Goals accomplished! 🐙

  decidable_le := 
DecidableRel fun a a_1 => a ≤ a_1
Goals accomplished! 🐙

  decidable_lt := 
DecidableRel fun a a_1 => a < a_1
